programme.title: Daktari
programme.desc: Dr Tracy treats an injured leopard and releases it into the wild but a visiting trade commissioner who wants to hunt for big game sets his sights on the leopard for his trophy Dr Tracy sets out to derail his plans

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: When Jennifer overhears an acquaintance and his mistress planning to murder his wife on the ski slopes she and Jonathan jet off to Vail to prevent it -- but are they too late to save her on the ski trail

programme.title: Cagney 408
programme.desc: A weekend spent clearing up lousy precinct paperwork leads Chris and Mary Beth to race to serve a warrant before the statute of limitations expires Meanwhile Det Petrie finds his weekend used up painting his apartment

programme.title: Starsky and Hutch
programme.desc: Hutchs girlfriend is a drug kingpins moll attempting to start a new life The kingpin wants her back and orders his goons to abduct Hutch and addict him to heroin For another fix will the strung-out Hutch divulge her hidden location

programme.title: Airwolf
programme.desc: A revolutionary breaks her father former dictator Marios Guzman out of a military prison Because her father received no medical treatment in prison she has her followers kidnap Doc who is on a fishing trip with String String vows to follow Doc but is advised not to get himself or Airwolf involved in anything political As it turns out a former comrade-in-arms of Guzmans learns that he is dying and plans to use his final address to the people as a rallying point to retake the government

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: Mickis young nephew befriends the reanimated corpse of a boy residing in the local haunted house

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: In this very special episode of Operation Repo its the 36 hours that change everything When Matt Froy and Lyndah go on a routine repo gone violently wrong the bonds that connect the Pizarro family may be torn apart forever

programme.title: Rim of the Canyon
programme.desc: ene Autrys stolen horse turns up in a ghost town where Gene goes after he is left stranded during a stagecoach race

programme.title: Munsters 111
programme.desc: Munsters 111

programme.title: Munsters 114
programme.desc: Munsters 114

programme.title: Addams Family 131
programme.desc: Addams Family 131

programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E22

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E29
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E29

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Wilbur Post and his wife Carol move into their first house They find the previous tenants horse abandoned in the backyard barn Carol insists on selling the animal but Wilbur wants to keep it To his surprise the horse agrees with him

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The Posts neighbor Roger catches Mister Ed and Wilbur talking to each other

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A notorious gunfighter gets married and promises his new wife that he will take off his guns and begin a new life However a gang of outlaws who hear that he is in the area try to persuade him to break that promise and throw in with them

programme.title: Gunsmoke S06E32 Long Hours Short Pay
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S06E32 Long Hours Short Pay

programme.title: Gunsmoke S06E28 Little Girl
programme.desc: Gunsmoke S06E28 Little Girl

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss falls prey to the wiles of a beautiful woman with a gambling addiction and refuses to believe shes only interested in his money in spite of Adams proof to the contrary

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The Night of the Deadly Bed

programme.title: Tarantulas The Deadly Cargo
programme.desc: Townsfolk unite against spiders freed from a crashed planes coffee-bean cargo

programme.title: Freddys Nightmares
programme.desc: A recent widow comes to the realization that her late husband purchased a winning lottery ticket so she goes to great lengths to recover it -- and keep the winnings for herself Meanwhile a grave digger resorts to blackmail to land the woman of his dreams

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: Tales From the Crypt
programme.desc: Tales From the Crypt

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: A stressed out bank employee begins having premonitions concerning a serial killer who could be any one of the men in her life

programme.title: The Hitchhiker
programme.desc: Sweet singer Miranda and her musician partner Sean are a couple of struggling songwriters who are trying desperately to break into the rock music business Miranda creates a sexy new image for herself in order to achieve the fame and success she desires However Miranda winds up paying an extremely heavy spiritual price because of said sexy image

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric locates Otto Renfield a crippled old sailor who knows Skorzeny and promises to help Eric find him But Renfield betrays Eric and traps him in the hold of his ship for Skorzeny

programme.title: Werewolf
programme.desc: Eric seeks help from college professor Dr Victor Degoethels who has written a book about werewolves throughout the ages But Alamo Joe has already warned him about Eric and his crimes

programme.title: Forever Knight
programme.desc: A murderer who meets his victims through a dating service stalks Natalie and she learns of Nicks secret past

programme.title: Friday the 13th The Series
programme.desc: On Halloween night Micki and Ryan are visited by the ghost of their late uncle who has returned from the underworld

programme.title: Prophecy
programme.desc: A government health inspector is dispatched to assess the damage a logging company is causing to a patch of forest claimed by Native Americans and comes face to face with true terror wreaking havoc in the woods

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carter asks Gomer to take his place on a date

programme.title: Gomer Pyle USMC
programme.desc: Carters adopted Korean daughter arrives-but shes not the little girl he remembers

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: Gilligan and The Skipper find a government briefcase with top-secret information in the lagoon and when Gilligan handcuffs himself to the briefcase he becomes afraid that the enemy will come to the island and kill him

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A smooth-talking criminal comes to the island and holds the women on the island hostage in exchange for ransom money but when he is captured they decide to try and reform him instead of holding him prisoner

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E26
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E26

programme.title: Real McCoys S04E28
programme.desc: Real McCoys S04E28

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Max becomes a drunken jobless bum so that KAOS will recruit him

programme.title: Get Smart
programme.desc: Buildings are being blown up in Washington by paintings that include explosives

programme.title: BJ and the Bear
programme.desc: B J McKay a guitar-playing independent trucker who travels with a fun-loving chimpanzee named Bear finds himself caught up with a bunch of young women trying to flee a white slaver who happens to be the local sheriff The Foundlings part 2

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: The wives horn in on Wilbur and Rogers duck hunting trip

programme.title: Mister Ed
programme.desc: Rogers brother-in-law is begging Wilbur to write a follow-up hit song to Pretty Little Filly He wants it to be a blues number so Wilbur does his best to get Ed in a depressed mood

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: When Hochstetter works to lower a French pilots resistance to interrogation Hogan brings the mans fiancee to camp to have Klink marry them

programme.title: Hogans Heroes
programme.desc: Hogan enlists an attractive agents help in blackmailing Gen Burkhalter so Klink wont be punished for the destruction of a newly built radio tower

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: McHale and The 73 Crew must practice some trickery to keep Binghamton from building his new Officers Club on McHales island

programme.title: McHales Navy
programme.desc: Santa McHale must practice some psychological warfare when he the crew Binghamton and a war correspondent are captured by a Japanese patrol while on a mission to bring some Christmas joy to the children of a nearby orphanage

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Wood spends his wedding anniversary in New York as a guest on CBSs NFL show

programme.title: Evening Shade
programme.desc: Still-unemployed Herman moves in with Freda in exchange for doing jobs around the house

programme.title: Vega
programme.desc: Dan is hired by a man to look for his daughter who is pregnant While Dan tries to find her someone is following him When he eventually finds her she calls her father to come but when he arrive she claims he is not her father Thats when he pulls a gun

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: Jonathan and Jennifer are in Hawaii for a croquet tournament when a tournament official is stabbed and the Harts wind up in an international dilemma involving the KGB MI-6 the CIA and a fancy key that may unlock deadly secrets

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Joanna convinces Dick to direct a play for the town but is angry when he refuses to cast her in the lead

programme.title: Newhart
programme.desc: Lost in the woods during a snowstorm Stephanie takes refuge in an empty cabin

programme.title: Major 125
programme.desc: Major 125

programme.title: Gilligans Island
programme.desc: A mad scientist invites the castaways to his island where he hopes to conduct strange experiments on them

programme.title: Baywatch Nights
programme.desc: Several members of a 1970s surfing rock band die during a reunion at the beach and Mitch investigates Meanwhile Donna is tricked into jumping off a bridge and spends the night in the water where she is rescued by two men carrying out a mysterious mission

programme.title: Operation Repo
programme.desc: Operation Repo

programme.title: OPReEpisode804SD
programme.desc: OPReEpisode804SD

programme.title: Becket
programme.desc: King Henry II of England comes to terms with his affection for his close friend and confidant Thomas Becket who finds his true honor by observing Gods divine will rather than the Kings

programme.title: Dark Night of the Scarecrow
programme.desc: In a small Southern town four vigilantes wrongfully execute a mentally-challenged man but after the court sets them free mysterious accidents begin to kill them off one by one

programme.title: The Dukes of Hazzard
programme.desc: Bo and Luke learn that their artist friend Grannie Annie is the mastermind behind a small-time counterfeiting ring After her arrest Boss seizes the engraving plates to sell to no-nonsense counterfeiter Big John Downey Bo and Luke work to clear Annies name unaware that their efforts may have deadly consequences for Boss

programme.title: Hercules 111
programme.desc: Hercules 111

programme.title: Earth Final Conflict
programme.desc: Earth Final Conflict

programme.title: War of the Worlds
programme.desc: A revolutionary med cell is created that could save countless lives But fearing that the Morthrens could turn it into something deadly the Blackwood team tries to get their hands on it first Meanwhile Malzor desperately tries to acquire it to heal a dying Mana his second-in-command

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: Two spoilt rich girls inveigle Will against his will into taking them into the swamp so they can perform a ritual to give them three wishes In the course of teaching them a lesson in humility Will makes a discovery about himself

programme.title: Swamp Thing
programme.desc: When an injured escapee from a mental hospital arrives at Will and Tressas door after running into Alec he claims to be an alien on a mission Hes obviously insane - or is he

programme.title: Space 1999
programme.desc: On the ice world of Ultima Thule the Alphans encounter members of lost earth expedition who have achieved immortality- but at a price!

programme.title: Attack of the Giant Leaches
programme.desc: Fear grips a nondescript city after its residents disappear mysteriously from across the town Surprisingly a gamekeeper stumbles upon the role of blood-sucking leeches behind the disappearances

programme.title: Cheyenne
programme.desc: Helping a friend keep her saloon from a crooked gambling combine Cheyenne runs it while she gets to know her daughter who for ten years has been at school back East and knows nothing of how her mother earned the money that kept her there

programme.title: Young 307
programme.desc: Young 307

programme.title: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years
programme.desc: Lonesome Dove Outlaw Years

programme.title: The Streets of San Francisco
programme.desc: Jacob Willis a trusted employee of a local businessman pays money to a skid-row drifter who was blackmailing him After Jacob leaves him the drifter is accidentally killed in a scuffle with two other hobos One of them tells the police that Jacob killed the man After talking to Jacob Stone has doubts that he could be a killer but then he finds out what the drifter knew about Jacob that he escaped from an Alabama prison 25 years ago Jacob believes he killed a guard during the escape and thinks he must run away or face imprisonment His employers young son trusts Jacob and wants to run away with him

programme.title: Mission Impossible
programme.desc: IMF team leader Dan Briggs assembles his team for the first time The mission to recover two nuclear warheads belonging to General Rio Dominguez from a hotel vault in Santa Costa Jim and Willy sneak safe-cracker Terry Targo into the vault who figures out how to get out The team then captures Dominguez but Targos fingers are broken in the attempt With no other alternative Briggs has himself and Dominguez put into the vault and Briggs threatens to enter a random combination if Alicio doesnt tell him the code Dominguez breaks With the bombs defused Willy takes the warheads out of the vault Briggs remains behind and uses the information Targo gathered earlier to get out during a fireworks distraction set off by Barney Briggs and the rest of the team make a desperate race for safety and get onto a plane heading to safety seconds before the military can catch up to them

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon investigate a series of burglaries that are taking place during the day and the victims are those with a recent wedding or death in the family A senior citizen uses the paper to find homes that are empty during the day

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: An ex-con who places an ad in a newspaper gets a reply referring to making a killing for 1000 He turns the reply over to Friday and Gannon who investigate the possibility that the replier is soliciting murder

programme.title: The Fugitive S02E17
programme.desc: The Fugitive S02E17

programme.title: Big Valley
programme.desc: The arrival of an old friend of Victoria and Toms causes trouble in the Valley due to the mans claim on a plot of land which has been earmarked as the location of a new dam

programme.title: Revenge of the Dragon
programme.desc: Action star Ramon Zamora stars in this action packed golden oldie A cruel twist of fate turns a peaceful man into a one man death force as he embarks on a violent vengeance trial

programme.desc: A US presidents highly classified secret agent must find a fearless replacement to take over his extremely dangerous military missions

programme.title: Bionic Ever After
programme.desc: Steve Austin and Jaime Summers are about to get married However before they can something is happening to Jaime It seems like her bionics are failing and no one knows whats wrong with her It seems that someone has been doing something to her who and why At the same time an old friend of Steves is being held prisoner by some terrorists and Steve needing to take his mind off Jaime offers to go and help

programme.title: Firewalker
programme.desc: Two seasoned adventurers recruited by a seemingly psychic woman with a treasure map go on an adventure to recover a horde of gold belonging to an ancient being called the Firewalker

programme.title: Lion of the Desert
programme.desc: Set during the reign of Mussolini this epic tale revolves around Libyan leader Omar Mukhtar Omar an Arab Muslim rebel takes on the Italian attack which is directed towards conquering Libya

programme.desc: With her parents out of town high school senior Trish decides to throw a slumber party but things go downhill when an escaped killer wielding a power drill is loose in the neighbourhood

programme.title: Chopping Mall
programme.desc: A group of young shopping mall employees stay behind for a late night party in one of the stores When the mall goes on lock-down before they can get out the robot security system malfunctions and goes on a killing spree

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Jal Rorda Audrics loyal friend is tricked and captured by Saw Boss where the evil scientist Dr Zorg is zapping him with the mindsifter to discover Audrics whereabouts Jayce defies Saw Boss and goes to the planet Nar to rescue Jal Gorda

programme.title: Jayce and The Wheeled Warriors
programme.desc: Oon is recalled by the Squire Smith for his obvious fear in the face of Monster Minds Oon fears he will be melted down Upon arriving on the Squire Smiths planet Oon walks into a trap set by Monster Minds He then proves himself to the Squire

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: An explorer discovers an ancient Mayan City where giant stones become weightless under the full moonlight He sells this information to Miles Mayhem while Matt Trakker mounts his own excursion to the same location

programme.title: MASK
programme.desc: Every sail and all the sail-makers in Reykjavík have been confiscated by VENOM who play to raise the city from its foundations to find the lost fleet hidden beneath

programme.title: Dungeons Dragons
programme.desc: The kids learn of a magic river that can get them home On their way to the river however Eric accidentally turns himself into an ugly bogbeast The team must reverse the spell on Eric before the rivers magic runs out
